creator: freebsd@mhka.no
text:
I've made a pull request towards the github repo (https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd/pull/41) for documenting this.

Description:
Documented the sysctl MIB net.inet.sctp.blackhole in blackhole(4) man page, and updated MIB description to refer to said man page.

Also adjusted formatting under SYNOPSIS while here, to prevent cluttered line breaks in the middle of the optional parameters.

-

I think there should be a mention of whoever implemented SCTP blackholing (see commit 229805 (https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=229805)) in the blackhole(4) man page, but I don't know their name. Therefore, I didn't touch that. When adding credit to them, there may also be a need to adjust the existing credit entry with more details.
